privileged_info_summary: The agent must create an experiment file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/pain_vas.psyexp and a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/pain_stimuli.csv. The conditions file must contain columns 'stim_id' and 'image_file'. The experiment must include a vertical slider with labels 'No Sensation' and 'Worst Possible Sensation'.
